# thoth_governance_feed (Data Source)

Reads normalized governance feed events.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `agent_id` (String) Filter by agent ID.
- `caller_agent_id` (String) Filter by caller agent ID.
- `decision` (String) Filter by decision type.
- `from` (String) Start timestamp filter (RFC3339).
- `page` (Number) Page number (1-based).
- `per_page` (Number) Items per page.
- `reason_code` (String) Filter by reason code.
- `search` (String) Free-text search query.
- `sort_by` (String) Sort field.
- `sort_dir` (String) Sort direction: asc or desc.
- `to` (String) End timestamp filter (RFC3339).
- `tool_name` (String) Filter by tool name.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Event array as JSON.
- `total` (Number) Total matching events.
